blended.narrative: 49 Degrees North is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.0 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,989 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 25".
